title: cyanus persicus
intro: Cyanus persicus, also known as cornflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and eye infections. The health benefits of Cyanus persicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various health issues, including eczema, acne, and eye problems.
